name: snooze-preserves-existing-metadata-keys
description: handleSnooze writes snoozed_until via json_set(COALESCE(metadata,'{}'), ...), so it MUST preserve other metadata keys (e.g. sender, account) rather than clobbering the blob. If a future refactor switches to a plain UPDATE SET metadata=?, this scenario trips — and the reconciler / learning loop would silently lose sender attribution for every snoozed item.

db.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM tracked_items WHERE id = $fixture:0 AND json_extract(metadata,'$.sender') = 'founder@startup.io'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM tracked_items WHERE id = $fixture:0 AND json_extract(metadata,'$.snoozed_until') IS NOT NULL
